header.tagline: The perfect place to take a break

hero.title: Hotel Touring
hero.subtitle: In Livigno, at home among the Alps — where every stay becomes a memory.

hotelGuide.title: Hotel Guide
hotelGuide.subtitle: Everything you need for a perfect stay

restaurant.name: Restaurant
restaurant.desc: Traditional Valtellina cuisine with fresh seasonal produce. À la carte lunch available daily

spa.name: Spa & Wellness
spa.desc: Thermal wellness circuit with sauna, steam bath and hydro-pool. Treatment bookings available at reception

gym.name: Pool & Fitness
gym.desc: Heated indoor pool and fitness centre exclusively for hotel guests

pool.name: Heated Pool
pool.desc: Indoor heated pool with panoramic alpine views, exclusively for hotel guests

checkin.name: Check-in / Check-out
checkin.desc: For special timing requests, please contact reception at the time of booking, subject to availability

garage.name: Covered Garage
garage.desc: Complimentary covered garage for all hotel guests. Access with room key

skiDepot.name: Ski & Bike Storage
skiDepot.desc: Secure storage for skis, boots and bicycles. Access with room key

bikeRoom.name: Bike Room
bikeRoom.desc: Secure bike storage for all guests

ztl.name: ZTL Zone — Hotel Access
ztl.hours: Entry: Via Bondi | Exit: Via Pienz
ztl.desc: The hotel is located in a Limited Traffic Zone. The only permitted entrance is via Via Bondi (access N.5), while the exit is via Via Pienz. Please provide your vehicle registration number to reception at check-in.

kids.name: Mini Club
kids.desc: Games room for children with organised activities and games

personalizeStay.title: Personalize Your Stay
personalizeStay.subtitle: Curated extras delivered to your room
personalizeStay.formSubtitle: Our concierge will prepare your request within 30 minutes.
personalizeStay.sendError: Oops, something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.
personalizeStay.requestDesc: Our concierge will have everything ready in your room shortly.

wine.name: In-Room Wine
wine.shortDesc: Premium bottle in your room on arrival
wine.desc: Hand-picked from our cellar — Barolo, Amarone, or local Alto Adige varieties. Chilled or at room temperature.

massage.name: Massage Booking
massage.desc: Alpine herb ritual with warm stone therapy, performed at our spa.

cake.name: Celebration Cake
cake.desc: Our pastry chef creates bespoke cakes for birthdays, anniversaries, or honeymoons. Order 24h in advance.

flowers.name: Flower Bouquet
flowers.shortDesc: Fresh flowers in your room on request

wellness.title: Wellness & Spa
wellness.subtitle: A sanctuary of warmth, water and stillness in the Alps
wellness.intro: Take time to surrender to pure relaxation, leaving behind the pressures of everyday life and restoring body and mind with vital energy. Our Wellness Area offers a carefully designed blend of saunas, baths and warm environments, created entirely for your wellbeing. Let the combination of water and heat refresh you, allow new sensations of serenity to wash over you, and rediscover your vitality.
wellness.bookDesc: In-room massage, facial, and body wrap treatments available daily.
wellness.hours: Wellness open: Mon–Fri & Sun 16:00–20:00 | Saturday closed

sauna.name: Finnish Sauna
sauna.desc: Step inside and let the dry 90° heat envelop you: you will immediately feel a deep sense of calm and relaxation.

steam.name: Turkish Bath
steam.desc: This room reaches 45° at full steam. The healing oils and herbs dissolved in the vapour, absorbed through the skin and respiratory tract, deliver a beneficial effect throughout the entire body.

brechelbad.name: Brechelbad
brechelbad.desc: An aromatic sauna called Brechelbad at 55°, with vapours that will astonish your senses and give you the impression of being deep inside a forest.

shower.name: Relaxation Room
shower.desc: Moving from one treatment to another, take a restorative break in this dedicated lounge, with comfortable armchairs that add relaxation upon relaxation.

hydropool.name: Chromotherapy Shower
hydropool.desc: With its lateral water jets, the revitalising shower engages your senses through a surprising blend of water and colour.

livigno.title: Livigno Experience
livigno.subtitle: Discover the magic of the Alps — every season

winterContent.title: Winter Wonderland
winterContent.subtitle: World-class skiing at 1,816m — 115km of pistes
winterContent.skiPassDesc: Livigno is part of the Livigno Ski Area — 115km of pistes, 31 lifts, shared with Livigno and connected cross-country routes.

week.label: 6-Day Pass
week.note: Best value for a full week

winterContent.hutMapDesc: Warm up mid-slope at one of 8 mountain huts serving traditional Valtellina dishes — from Pizzoccheri to Bresaola.

trekking.name: Livigno Loop Trek
trekking.desc: Panoramic circuit around the valley with views over Lake Livigno and the Swiss border peaks

hiking.name: Passo d'Eira
hiking.desc: Scenic family-friendly route to the high alpine pass through wildflower meadows

bike.name: Mottolino Bike Park
bike.desc: World-class downhill and enduro trails serviced by gondola — from blue flow trails to black technical routes

larix.name: Larix Park
larix.desc: Treetop adventure park in the larch forest with rope courses, zip-lines and Tibetan bridges at various heights. Suitable for families, children and adults. Located at Teola, reachable by cable car.

lake.name: Lake Livigno
lake.desc: A stunning alpine reservoir nestled between the mountains, perfect for canoeing, kayaking, pedal boating and lakeside walks. Breathtaking views over the Rhaetian Alps.

lago_vago.name: Lago Vago
lago_vago.desc: A magical alpine lake at 2,523m, reached from Trepalle through meadows and scree. Turquoise crystal-clear water set in a rocky amphitheatre. One of the most breathtaking views around Livigno.

federia.name: Val Federia
federia.desc: An easy walk along the Federia stream through flowering meadows, larch forests and waterfalls. Perfect for families. The trail ends at the scenic Lago di Federia with views of the surrounding peaks.

bernina.label: Recommended excursion
bernina.name: Bernina Express — Red Train
bernina.descWinter: A fairytale journey through glaciers, snow-covered viaducts and breathtaking panoramas. The Bernina Express links Tirano to St. Moritz across the Rhaetian Alps — a UNESCO World Heritage route. In winter the landscape becomes an endless canvas of white peaks and frozen valleys.
bernina.descSummer: In summer the Red Train winds through green valleys, alpine lakes and flowering meadows. Departing from Tirano, just 45 minutes from Livigno. An unforgettable experience through some of the most beautiful alpine scenery in Europe.

cityPulse.title: City Pulse
cityPulse.subtitle: What's happening in Livigno
cityPulse.desc: Discover live events, festivals, markets, and local happenings in the heart of Livigno.
